target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible collapse of roof and upper floors; extensive fire and debris; structural integrity compromised; damage exceeds 75% of visible target area.

summary: One building is assessed as DESTROYED with confirmed damage exceeding 75% of its visible area, showing collapsed roof sections, extensive fire, and debris. The overall scene depicts a multi-story building heavily damaged by fire and structural collapse, with smoke rising and scattered wreckage across the foreground. The functional impact is likely catastrophic, as the building is no longer operational and poses significant safety hazards.
